{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Technical Service Manager",
  "description": "Excel and Grace Consulting is a fast-paced business consulting organization with a track record of delivering exceptional business solutions to small and medium-scale enterprises in Nigeria, Ghana, Germany, Switzerland, Canada, etc. We are certified management consultants with the International Council of&nbsp;&nbsp;Management Consulting Institutes (CMC-Global) with over 18 years of experience. Our team of experts and consultants have authored over 20 books on business management, business structure, business operations, human resources, organizational structure, employee development, money management, and so on.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

&nbsp;Job Position: Technical Service Manager

Job Location: Calabar, Cross River
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Technical Services Manager is responsible for overseeing all technical operations including site assessments, system installations, maintenance, and after-sales support across all branches.
	The role ensures high-quality service delivery, technical accuracy, and customer satisfaction, while maintaining standards in installation and post-installation support.


Key Responsibilities


	Supervise the installation, maintenance, and troubleshooting of solar power systems across assigned locations.
	Conduct site assessments and recommend suitable solar solutions based on customer requirements.
	Ensure all installations comply with company quality, safety, and technical standards.
	Provide technical support and resolve customer complaints within agreed timelines.
	Supervise and guide Technical Executives and Technicians to ensure efficient service delivery.
	Prepare and maintain accurate installation, maintenance, and technical service reports.
	Coordinate with the Sales, Operations, and Logistics teams to ensure smooth project execution.
	Perform other technical duties as assigned by management.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree or HND in Electrical Engineering, Renewable Energy, or related field
	Minimum of 5&ndash;7 years of experience in solar installations, electrical systems, or technical services
	Experience managing technical teams is an advantage
	Strong knowledge of solar systems, inverters, and electrical installations
	Problem-solving and analytical skills
	Ability to supervise and train technical staffGood communication and reporting skill.


Salary
N400,000 Monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: hr@eandg.com.ng, sophia.ipori@eandg.com.ng and eandg.tprecruiters@gmail.com using the Job Title as the subject of the email.",
  "datePosted": "2026-07-10",
  "validThrough": "2026-08-01",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Excel and Grace Consulting"
    
  },

    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Cross River",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },
  "identifier": {
    "@type": "PropertyValue",
    "name": "",
    "value": "201716"
  },
  "baseSalary": {
    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",
    "currency": "NGN",
    "value": {
      "@type": "QuantitativeValue",
      "minValue": 400000,
      "maxValue": 600000,
      "unitText": "MONTH"

}



Technical Service Manager Job at Excel and Grace Consulting




        
    

        
        Excel and Grace Consulting is a fast-paced business consulting organization with a track record of delivering exceptional business solutions to small and medium-scale enterprises in Nigeria, Ghana, Germany, Switzerland, Canada, etc. We are certified management consultants with the International Council of  Management Consulting Institutes (CMC-Global) with over 18 years of experience. Our team of experts and consultants have authored over 20 books on business management, business structure, business operations, human resources, organizational structure, employee development, money management, and so on.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Technical Service Manager
     

            
    



Job Location: Calabar, Cross River
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Technical Services Manager is responsible for overseeing all technical operations including site assessments, system installations, maintenance, and after-sales support across all branches.
	The role ensures high-quality service delivery, technical accuracy, and customer satisfaction, while maintaining standards in installation and post-installation support.


Key Responsibilities


	Supervise the installation, maintenance, and troubleshooting of solar power systems across assigned locations.
	Conduct site assessments and recommend suitable solar solutions based on customer requirements.
	Ensure all installations comply with company quality, safety, and technical standards.
	Provide technical support and resolve customer complaints within agreed timelines.
	Supervise and guide Technical Executives and Technicians to ensure efficient service delivery.
	Prepare and maintain accurate installation, maintenance, and technical service reports.
	Coordinate with the Sales, Operations, and Logistics teams to ensure smooth project execution.
	Perform other technical duties as assigned by management.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree or HND in Electrical Engineering, Renewable Energy, or related field
	Minimum of 5–7 years of experience in solar installations, electrical systems, or technical services
	Experience managing technical teams is an advantage
	Strong knowledge of solar systems, inverters, and electrical installations
	Problem-solving and analytical skills
	Ability to supervise and train technical staffGood communication and reporting skill.


Salary
N400,000 Monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected], [email protected] and [email protected] using the Job Title as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "title": "Assistant Business Analyst",
  "description": "Grand Oak Limited (GOL) - We are the largest Manufacturer of SpiritsandWines, we believe our spirits should have character; an authenticity derived from where they are distilled, bottled and the philosophies of those who distil them.

There are many attributes that describe us resolute, self-sufficient, tough, hard-working, enduring, emotional, passionate, philosophical and engaging.

We are&nbsp;&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

&nbsp;Job Position: Assistant Business Analyst
Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos

Summary


	The Assistant Business Analyst is responsible for providing effective sales and administrative support to the Fountain Head Director and field representatives in collation, analysis, and presentation of accurate sales reports for strategic sales decision-making.


Job Description


	Ensure all sales performance and stock analysis reports are accurate and timely.
	Liaise with Distributor Development Managers &amp; logistics team to ensure effective distribution of stock.
	Ensure achievement of e-commerce sales target.
	Track/monitor the use of sales tools such as Fieldmax and appraise the gaps/required improvement in line with the dictate of the market.
	Prepare a sales process compliance report.
	Handle specific sales development project as assigned by the Fountain Head Director for the purpose of achieving set business objectives.
	Ensure all special redistribution target is achieved.
	Provide sales BSC report as at when due.

Assistant Business Analyst Job at Grand Oak Limited (GOL)




        
    

        
        Grand Oak Limited (GOL) - We are the largest Manufacturer of SpiritsandWines, we believe our spirits should have character; an authenticity derived from where they are distilled, bottled and the philosophies of those who distil them.

There are many attributes that describe us resolute, self-sufficient, tough, hard-working, enduring, emotional, passionate, philosophical and engaging.

We are  recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Assistant Business Analyst
Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos

Summary
     

            
    




	The Assistant Business Analyst is responsible for providing effective sales and administrative support to the Fountain Head Director and field representatives in collation, analysis, and presentation of accurate sales reports for strategic sales decision-making.


Job Description


	Ensure all sales performance and stock analysis reports are accurate and timely.
	Liaise with Distributor Development Managers & logistics team to ensure effective distribution of stock.
	Ensure achievement of e-commerce sales target.
	Track/monitor the use of sales tools such as Fieldmax and appraise the gaps/required improvement in line with the dictate of the market.
	Prepare a sales process compliance report.
	Handle specific sales development project as assigned by the Fountain Head Director for the purpose of achieving set business objectives.
	Ensure all special redistribution target is achieved.
	Provide sales BSC report as at when due.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "HR Manager",
  "description": "Worknigeria - Our client, a reputable FMCG / Manufacturing company, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HR Manager

Job Location: Asaba, Delta
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Our client is seeking to hire an experienced HR Manager to lead and manage all human resource functions while supporting business objectives.
	The ideal candidate will have proven experience within a manufacturing environment, with a strong understanding of workforce planning, employee relations, performance management, compliance, and HR operations.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement HR strategies, policies, and procedures aligned with organizational goals.
	Oversee end-to-end recruitment, onboarding, and talent management processes.
	Manage employee relations, disciplinary matters, grievance handling, and conflict resolution.
	Drive performance management, learning and development, succession planning, and employee engagement initiatives.
	Ensure compliance with Nigerian labour laws, company policies, and statutory regulations.
	Partner with department heads to support manpower planning and organizational development.
	Oversee payroll inputs, leave administration, HR records, and other HR operational activities.
	Prepare HR reports, analyze workforce metrics, and provide recommendations to management.
	Foster a positive workplace culture while promoting health, safety, and employee well-being.


Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s degree in Human Resource Management, Business Administration, Industrial Relations, or a related discipline.
	Minimum of 7&ndash;10 years of HR experience, with at least 5 years in a managerial role within a manufacturing company.
	Strong knowledge of Nigerian labor laws, HR best practices, and performance management.
	Experience managing large operational or factory-based workforces.
	Excellent leadership, stakeholder management, communication, and conflict resolution skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office and HRIS/payroll systems.
	CIPM or other relevant HR certification is an added advantage.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: careers@worknigeria.com using &quot;HR Manager &ndash; Asaba&quot; as the subject of the email.",

HR Manager Job at Worknigeria




        
    

        
        Worknigeria - Our client, a reputable FMCG / Manufacturing company, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HR Manager

Job Location: Asaba, Delta
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Our client is seeking to hire an experienced HR Manager to lead and manage all human resource functions while supporting business objectives.
	The ideal candidate will have proven experience within a manufacturing environment, with a strong understanding of workforce planning, employee relations, performance management, compliance, and HR operations.


Key Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Develop and implement HR strategies, policies, and procedures aligned with organizational goals.
	Oversee end-to-end recruitment, onboarding, and talent management processes.
	Manage employee relations, disciplinary matters, grievance handling, and conflict resolution.
	Drive performance management, learning and development, succession planning, and employee engagement initiatives.
	Ensure compliance with Nigerian labour laws, company policies, and statutory regulations.
	Partner with department heads to support manpower planning and organizational development.
	Oversee payroll inputs, leave administration, HR records, and other HR operational activities.
	Prepare HR reports, analyze workforce metrics, and provide recommendations to management.
	Foster a positive workplace culture while promoting health, safety, and employee well-being.


Requirements


	Bachelor's degree in Human Resource Management, Business Administration, Industrial Relations, or a related discipline.
	Minimum of 7–10 years of HR experience, with at least 5 years in a managerial role within a manufacturing company.
	Strong knowledge of Nigerian labor laws, HR best practices, and performance management.
	Experience managing large operational or factory-based workforces.
	Excellent leadership, stakeholder management, communication, and conflict resolution skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office and HRIS/payroll systems.
	CIPM or other relevant HR certification is an added advantage.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "HR Manager – Asaba" as the subject of the email.

We serve developing markets across Africa, the Middle East, and Southeast Asia, empowering mining operations, businesses, industries, and households with reliable energy access. We are dedicated to closing the energy gap where economic expansion outpaces electricity supply, building sustainable ecosystems where infrastructure reliably keeps pace with growth ambitions.

We are&nbsp;&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:&nbsp;

Job Position: Videographer

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Job type: Full time

Requirements


	Must own a professional camera.
	Proven experience in product videography.
	Ability to operate drones (ownership is an added advantage but not compulsory).
	Proficient in video shooting, editing, lighting, and content creation.
	Strong attention to detail and visual storytelling skills.
	Must provide a portfolio of previous&nbsp;&nbsp;work.


Salary
N300,000 / month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: hr@powerarkinfra.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Videographer Job at Power Ark




        
    

        
        Power Ark delivers end-to-end photovoltaic (PV) and energy storage solutions—from manufacturing, construction to ongoing maintenance. We serve developing markets across Africa, the Middle East, and Southeast Asia, empowering mining operations, businesses, industries, and households with reliable energy access. We are dedicated to closing the energy gap where economic expansion outpaces electricity supply, building sustainable ecosystems where infrastructure reliably keeps pace with growth ambitions.

We are  recruiting to fill the position below: 

Job Position: Videographer

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Job type: Full time

Requirements
     

            
    




	Must own a professional camera.
	Proven experience in product videography.
	Ability to operate drones (ownership is an added advantage but not compulsory).
	Proficient in video shooting, editing, lighting, and content creation.
	Strong attention to detail and visual storytelling skills.
	Must provide a portfolio of previous  work.


Salary
N300,000 / month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Applications without a portfolio will not be considered.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Business Development Executive (BD)",
  "description": "Transsion Holdings, the company formerly known as TECNO TELECOM LIMITED, established in July 2006, is a high-tech company specializing in the R&amp;D, production, sale and service of mobile communication products. After years of development, Transsion has become an important part of the mobile phone industry and one of the major mobile phone manufacturers in the world. Currently, it has full ownership of three famous mobile phone brands TECNO, itel and Infinix, and an after-sales service brand Carlcare.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Executive (BD)

Job Location: Kaduna
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Business Development Executive is responsible for identifying and securing new business opportunities, expanding the company&#39;s retail presence, and driving sales growth for itel electronic products.
	The role requires a results-oriented individual with strong sales, negotiation, and relationship management skills who can effectively convince customers, distributors, and business partners to invest in itel&#39;s range of electronic products.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and develop new business opportunities to increase market penetration and sales of itel electronic products.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with distributors, retailers, dealers, and key business partners.
	Promote and sell itel electronic products while effectively communicating their value proposition to prospective customers.
	Conduct market research to identify potential business locations, new customers, and emerging market trends.
	Evaluate and recommend suitable retail sites or sales outlets to support business expansion.
	Negotiate commercial terms with partners and ensure successful onboarding of new business accounts.
	Prepare business proposals, reports, sales forecasts, and market analysis to support decision-making.
	Monitor competitor activities and recommend strategies to improve market share.
	Collaborate with the sales and marketing teams to execute promotional campaigns and product launches.
	Achieve assigned sales, business development, and expansion targets while ensuring excellent customer service.


Qualifications &amp; Experience


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Business Administration, Marketing, Sales, or a related field.
	2&ndash;3 years of experience in Business Development, Sales, or Account Management.
	Experience in the mobile phone or consumer electronics industry is highly preferred.
	Candidates with experience as a Sales Representative within the electronics or mobile phone industry will have an added advantage.
	Experience in property acquisition, retail expansion, or site selection is an added advantage.


Salary
N100,000 / month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Cover letter to: itelrecruitment@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Business Development Executive (BD) Job at Transsion Holdings




        
    

        
        Transsion Holdings, the company formerly known as TECNO TELECOM LIMITED, established in July 2006, is a high-tech company specializing in the R&D, production, sale and service of mobile communication products. After years of development, Transsion has become an important part of the mobile phone industry and one of the major mobile phone manufacturers in the world. Currently, it has full ownership of three famous mobile phone brands TECNO, itel and Infinix, and an after-sales service brand Carlcare.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Executive (BD)

Job Location: Kaduna
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

            
    




	The Business Development Executive is responsible for identifying and securing new business opportunities, expanding the company's retail presence, and driving sales growth for itel electronic products.
	The role requires a results-oriented individual with strong sales, negotiation, and relationship management skills who can effectively convince customers, distributors, and business partners to invest in itel's range of electronic products.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and develop new business opportunities to increase market penetration and sales of itel electronic products.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with distributors, retailers, dealers, and key business partners.
	Promote and sell itel electronic products while effectively communicating their value proposition to prospective customers.
	Conduct market research to identify potential business locations, new customers, and emerging market trends.
	Evaluate and recommend suitable retail sites or sales outlets to support business expansion.
	Negotiate commercial terms with partners and ensure successful onboarding of new business accounts.
	Prepare business proposals, reports, sales forecasts, and market analysis to support decision-making.
	Monitor competitor activities and recommend strategies to improve market share.
	Collaborate with the sales and marketing teams to execute promotional campaigns and product launches.
	Achieve assigned sales, business development, and expansion targets while ensuring excellent customer service.


Qualifications & Experience


	Bachelor's Degree in Business Administration, Marketing, Sales, or a related field.
	2–3 years of experience in Business Development, Sales, or Account Management.
	Experience in the mobile phone or consumer electronics industry is highly preferred.
	Candidates with experience as a Sales Representative within the electronics or mobile phone industry will have an added advantage.
	Experience in property acquisition, retail expansion, or site selection is an added advantage.


Salary
